indicator.unmet: This trip does not match the "{{label}}" criterion
indicator.unknown: Criteria not provided by the original traveler for "{{label}}"

fullTripSuggestions.panelTitle: Find the trip that suits you
fullTripSuggestions.panelSubtitle: Tell us what you're looking for: we'll search the trips shared by the community.
fullTripSuggestions.mustCityHint: Optional — prioritizes trips that go through this city.
fullTripSuggestions.flexLabel: Allow one day more or less
fullTripSuggestions.allOptionalHint: All fields are optional: run the search without filling anything in to browse every trip shared in this country.
fullTripSuggestions.nbDaysHint: Optional — leave empty to discover trips of any duration and decide afterwards.
fullTripSuggestions.emptyText: No shared trip matches a duration of {{days}} days in this country yet.
fullTripSuggestions.emptyTextAnyDuration: No shared trip in this country yet.
fullTripSuggestions.mustCityNotFound: The city "{{city}}" could not be located — the condition was not applied.
fullTripSuggestions.noneWithMustCity: No trip goes through {{city}} for this duration — here are the other matching trips.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmReplaceText_one: This country already has {{count}} planned city: it will be permanently deleted and replaced by this imported trip. This action cannot be undone.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmReplaceText_other: This country already has {{count}} planned cities: they will be permanently deleted and replaced by this imported trip. This action cannot be undone.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmMoreDaysText_one: This trip is {{count}} day longer than the duration you asked for — it will be imported as is, you can still adjust the organization afterwards.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmMoreDaysText_other: This trip is {{count}} days longer than the duration you asked for — it will be imported as is, you can still adjust the organization afterwards.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmFewerDaysText_one: This trip is {{count}} day shorter than the duration you asked for — it will be imported as is, you can still adjust the organization afterwards.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmFewerDaysText_other: This trip is {{count}} days shorter than the duration you asked for — it will be imported as is, you can still adjust the organization afterwards.
fullTripSuggestions.confirmNoDatesText: Your trip has no dates yet: this trip will be imported "to be dated". As soon as you pick your departure date, it will become day 1 and every city and activity will fall into place automatically.

activity.allDayToggleTitle: All day (no precise time slot — useful for a daytrip)
activity.costInputTitle: Activity price (ticket, entry, meal…) — leave empty if unknown
activity.resizeHandleTitle: Drag down to stretch across the following time slots (or days)
activity.removeFromPlanningTitle: Remove from planning (stays available in the city)

trajet.farTitle: About {{distance}} as the crow flies from "{{place}}" — consider planning a proper trip (train, plane…)
trajet.nearTitle: Distance as the crow flies from "{{place}}" — approximate (doesn't account for terrain or transport mode)

day.addDatesTitle: Add dates to the trip to schedule

place.emptyList: No places yet — add one below
place.searchPlaceholder: Search for a place in {{city}}… (Enter to add)
place.searchPlaceholderDefault: Search for a place, a landmark… (Enter to add)
place.noResults: No results — press Enter to add "{{query}}"

tripSuggestions.disclaimer: These plans come from other travelers — the closest matches to your criteria are shown first.
tripSuggestions.editorialNoticeText: Not from a real trip — it may be less precise than community suggestions.
tripSuggestions.durationTitle: This activity spans several time slots/days in the original trip
tripSuggestions.replaceNoticeText: The current content of {{city}} will be replaced by this plan.
tripSuggestions.filteredEmptyText: None of the suggestions for this city match the selected criteria.
tripSuggestions.willSetDaysNotice_one: You haven't set a stay duration for this city yet. Importing this suggestion will automatically set it to {{count}} day.
tripSuggestions.willSetDaysNotice_other: You haven't set a stay duration for this city yet. Importing this suggestion will automatically set it to {{count}} days.
tripSuggestions.addedToCartText: Plan added to your selection for {{city}} — would you like to continue with other cities, or import now?
tripSuggestions.noCitiesYet: No shared plan exists yet for this country.
tripSuggestions.confirmLoseCart: You have cities pending import ({{list}}) that will be lost if you continue.
tripSuggestions.loadError: Couldn't load suggestions right now. Please try again shortly.
tripSuggestions.importCartError: Import failed for: {{cities}}. Please try again shortly.

daytrip.expandTitle: Expand (drag the card to schedule it all on one day)
daytrip.collapseTitle: Collapse (drag the card to schedule it all on one day)
daytrip.costTitle: Cost of activities and trips for the {{city}} daytrip (excluding accommodation)
daytrip.planOnDayTitle: Schedule this daytrip on a day

city.costTitle: Cost of activities and trips for {{city}} (excluding accommodation and daytrips)
city.addDaytripSearchPlaceholder: Search for a daytrip city… (or Enter to add)
city.searchPlaceholderDefault: Search for a city… (or Enter to add)
city.startDateFieldTitle: Start date (optional, to anchor an imported plan)
city.startDateFieldHint: Optional — used to anchor an imported plan onto the calendar; the duration is then derived from the activities you place there.
city.confirmDateBreaksGroupImportWarning: Confirming the date for just this city means you won't be able to place the whole imported plan at once anymore — you'll need to date each city one by one. To place everything at once, set the trip's departure date instead. You can still confirm if you'd like.
city.confirmDateTitle: Nothing is saved until you click here — picking a date by mistake can't move your activities
city.pendingDateTitle: Pick a start date for this city: the imported activities will fall into place on the right days automatically
city.duplicateConfirmText: "{{city}}" is already in this trip. Do you want to add it again anyway?

destination.modeManualDesc: Build your itinerary city by city, at your own pace.
destination.modeSuggestionsDesc: Import a complete trip shared by other travelers.
destination.removeTitle: Remove this country from the trip

lodging.searchPlaceholder: Search for the hotel/lodging in {{city}}… (Enter to type it as-is)
lodging.coordsStaleWarning: ⚠️ Address changed: the map marker will be removed (coordinates no longer match).
lodging.researchLinkChange: 🔍 Search again (to change the position on the map)
lodging.dateError: The check-out date must be on or after the check-in date.

group.hideActivitiesTitle: Hide places (drag the card to schedule it all on one day)
group.showActivitiesTitle: Show group places (drag the card to schedule it all on one day)
group.dragToPlanTitle: Drag to schedule it all on one day
group.planGroupOnDayTitle: Schedule all places in this group on a day
group.emptyHint: Group your places by neighborhood or theme. Click a place's colored dot to assign it.
group.autoDetectTitle: Automatically detect zones by geographic clustering ({{count}} geolocated places)
group.columnHint: Group your places by neighborhood or area: each zone colors its points on the map and can be dropped onto a day all at once. "Detect zones" creates them automatically by geographic clustering.

attachments.validateBadType: File type not accepted (JPG/PNG/WEBP/HEIC image or PDF only).
attachments.needLoginToAdd: You must be logged in to add an attachment.
attachments.openFailed: Unable to open this file right now.
attachments.allowPopups: Allow pop-ups to open this attachment.
attachments.panelLabel: 📎 My attachments (tickets, bookings, QR codes…) — visible to you only
attachments.addButton: + Add a file (image or PDF, 15 MB max)

dayView.cityForDayTitle: City planned for this day (based on the activities scheduled that day)
dayView.importedDayTitle: The imported trip was longer than your dates: this day was added automatically so nothing from the imported plan gets lost
dayView.cutHereTitle: Stop the activity right before this slot (removes this one and all following)
dayView.noDatesNotice: Set trip dates to see the day view and schedule your activities by time slot.
dayView.hint: Drag a place onto a time slot (Morning / Afternoon / Evening) to schedule it, or pull the handle at the bottom of a scheduled activity to stretch it across the following slots — or days

dayMode.noDates: Set the trip's start and end dates to use Day mode.
dayMode.datesInverted: The return date is before the departure date — check the trip dates in the header.
dayMode.beforeTrip: This trip hasn't started yet (departure on {{date}}). Day mode shows the current day's activities during the trip.
dayMode.afterTrip: This trip is over (return on {{date}}). Day mode has nothing left to show.

header.dayModeNeedDatesTitle: Set trip dates to use Day mode
header.dayModeEnterTitle: Day mode: shows only the current day's activities
header.icalAllDoneTitle: All scheduled activities are already marked done — nothing to export to your calendar
header.icalNoneTitle: Schedule at least one place on a date to export it to your calendar
header.icalExportTitle: Export scheduled (unchecked) places to your calendar (.ics file, compatible with Google Calendar and others)
header.budgetTitle: Total budget: {{activities}} for activities and trips + {{lodgings}} for accommodation
header.notesPlaceholder: General trip notes (hotel, budget, useful contacts…)

shareTemplate.toggleLabel: Automatically share this trip as a template
shareTemplate.infoText: Only places and their days/times are shared, and kept up to date automatically — never your attachments, notes, or accommodations.
shareTemplate.endTripTitle: Share this trip as a template?
shareTemplate.endTripText: Your trip "{{title}}" is over. Would you like to turn on automatic sharing of this trip as a planning template for other travelers?
shareTemplate.criteriaTitle: How would you describe this trip?
shareTemplate.criteriaText: Select the criteria that match this trip (optional): they will help other travelers find suggestions suited to their situation.
shareTemplate.criteriaHint: You can change these criteria at any time from the trip header.

sidebar.title: My trips
sidebar.emptySub: Start by creating your first itinerary

map.emptyHint: Add places via search to see them on the map

emptyEditor.title: Ready to plan?
emptyEditor.subtitle: Select a trip from the list or create a new one to get started.

features: Organize by city and by day
gate.title: Plan your next trip
gate.desc: Create and organize your itineraries step by step, city by city, day by day. All in one place, for free.

share.title: Share this trip
share.noCompanionsYet: You're traveling alone for now. Invite your travel companions!
share.inviteDesc: Invite a Triply traveler by their username. They'll be able to view and edit this trip.
share.accountNote: The user must have a Triply account. Travelers can disable invitations in their profile settings.
share.errSelectUser: Select a user from the list.
share.errNoInvitations: This user doesn't accept trip invitations.
share.errAlreadyMember: This user is already a member of the trip.
share.errAlreadyPending: An invitation is already pending for this traveler.

editor.addCountryPrompt: Add a country to get started
editor.expandMapTitle: Expand the map as an overlay

expenses.title: Trip expenses
expenses.subtitle: Keep track of who paid what: add an amount under the participant who paid, everyone sees the totals.
expenses.formerNote: No longer part of the trip — their amounts are kept.
expenses.deltaTitle: Difference from the average per person
expenses.emptyHint: No expenses yet. Add a first amount under the participant who paid.

trips.duplicatePartialWarning: Your trip was duplicated, but {{parts}} are missing from the copy. Check the new trip and complete it if needed.

print.statusDatesInverted: Trip dates are inconsistent (return before departure).
print.statusBeforeTrip: This trip hasn't started yet (departure on {{date}}).

page.title: Plan my trip — Triply
page.description: Plan your trip step by step with Triply: build your itinerary, organize your cities, places and activities, manage your dates — free and online.
